textByHashes.7502fb210d146ec42a9ed96f959788d97330a927: We're going to play a game. Do you like to play games?
textByHashes.8c8bdd7037637cce26becb28ea6b7765e2999a00: Whether you get hurt or not is entirely up to you. Your fate is in your own hands.
textByHashes.aa16a5e16f6a6ada2263481888eec60627d4d4d0: Ah, , how kind of you to join us. Now if you say another word, I will end her right now!
textByHashes.63dcf4904be2f4602f5fd773d910ca5ddd80f161: Sorry, where were we? Ah yes, of course! The game!
textByHashes.0a7fe3725b8984fd88d0785d84754a3425709a7a: You have to have a favourite.
textByHashes.56b33555e04b7eff60400a55b161991d49e51fc3: Good, good. And now for that game I spoke about.
textByHashes.3efe4bad2ad229221627d658f5b62d7e20255011: I am going to ask you one question. Get it wrong and you die, but get it right and you live.
textByHashes.d3ccb34e828faddc653d715739b315e5554a5c66: Then think hard about your answer. You like vampyres so this should be easy for you. The question is this...
textByHashes.f402135adf3bce455ffce6a9156ac67a2ff98c32: Who is the Vampyre that resides in South Misthalin?
textByHashes.e5ed29a2080920066e893d1c8b378ab45f43c90b: This game didn't involve you ! Now her death is on you! Her blood is on your hands you fool!
textByHashes.1bcffa4450a469b54c4005be9f59e3ec326c6ade: Oh Lacey, Lacey, Lacey. I did tell you to think hard about your answer.
textByHashes.a0fc2ff44f92c51c7a962b25f294e114fc34f3b4: Count Draynor is in fact a vampyre, and he does reside in his manor in Misthalin.
textByHashes.4339975c90870a75a166dcec9904b8072e257846: But that manor is in WEST Misthalin! I was talking about Count Check! Thanks for playing!
textByHashes.48757a81607e9c746e78ad0d9f278f7a74dd3858: So we meet at last. I have to say, I'm impressed you worked out my riddles.
textByHashes.7dbe0531ab57a41977331927132f6d539b104609: Oh really? All the dead bodies suggest otherwise. And what did you do to stop them?
textByHashes.0e321613052d2302618b8fb6641036069447642a: People think you are some big hero but you're not. All you adventurers are the same. Nothing but opportunists!
textByHashes.cd02be054b4dca2f4fb06059cc4444f283ad0150: Well, I did have this big speech planned out but quite frankly I don't think you are worth the effort it would take to deliver it.
textByHashes.d9b0f3032468c14c9ab2b6e40b69c45046821dad: So, this is the end of the line for you. It is time for the final act. The showdown. The finale. Let's see if you are up to the challenge!
textByHashes.47f160f550e25c9dd0283596fd0321baf8e2a80b: Urgh...I think I may have underestimated you.
